summary: Tested three new features: Button text sizing standardization, Video upload endpoint, and VideoUploader component in admin Site Settings. All features are working correctly.

details: Site settings API supports hero_video_url field
Hero video URL can be updated via PUT request

elements_verified: Enter URL toggle button with data-testid='toggle-url-input-btn'
Help text: 'Supported formats: MP4, WebM, MOV. Max size: 100MB'
Video preview with controls when URL is set
Remove video button (red X) on preview

button_text_sizes.notes: Button component at /app/frontend/components/ui/button.tsx has smaller, more balanced text sizes. Buttons visible on pages render with appropriate sizing.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Video upload feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint at /api/uploads/video accepts MP4, WebM, MOV files up to 100MB. Admin Site Settings page has VideoUploader component on Homepage tab with upload button, URL input option, help text, and video preview with controls. Button component text sizes have been standardized to text-xs (default), text-[11px] (sm), text-sm (lg).
screenshots_taken: site-settings-initial.png - Shows Site Settings page with tabs
site-settings-homepage.png - Shows Homepage tab with Hero Section
hero-video-section.png - Shows VideoUploader component with preview, Upload Video button, Enter URL button, and help text
